first_run.rationale: The score is identical across both evaluations (4/10), and the core reasoning remains unchanged. Both versions correctly identify the candidate's strengths in general software engineering and staff-level experience while consistently pointing out the same critical gaps: a lack of Python experience, insufficient time working on production AI systems, and no evidence of specific required technologies like RAG or vector databases. The minor differences in wording and emphasis are well within the bounds of normal run-to-run variation and do not reflect any bias related to the change in name.
